codeReview.summary: Clean implementation of typed frontend error classes (ValidationError, AuthError, NetworkError). Each class correctly extends native Error, sets the appropriate name property, and includes JSDoc documentation. Test coverage is comprehensive with 15 test cases verifying instantiation, name property, Error inheritance, message preservation, and stack trace retention.

summary: PASS - The frontend-error-classes feature fully implements the requirements. All three error classes (ValidationError, AuthError, NetworkError) are correctly implemented with proper Error extension, name property setting, JSDoc documentation, and comprehensive test coverage. The implementation satisfies all validation assertions (VAL-ERR-006, VAL-ERR-007, VAL-ERR-008). The worker followed proper procedures and the code adheres to project conventions.
